title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Weekend Language Club
questions.text: Practise Spanish with students from other schools every Saturday afternoon. Activities include games, short films and conversation tasks. Beginners are welcome, but you should already know numbers, colours and simple greetings.
questions.question: Who is the club suitable for?

options.A: Students with a little knowledge of Spanish.
options.B: Students who want private Spanish lessons.
options.C: Students who can already speak Spanish fluently.

questions.explanation: Beginners are welcome, but they need basic Spanish.

questions.heading: Message from Nina to Oscar
questions.text: Oscar, the library book you wanted is back, but I’ve put it on the desk because I’m leaving early. If you still need it for your project, ask Mrs Green before another student borrows it. Nina
questions.question: Why has Nina sent this message?

options.B: To tell Oscar he can now collect a book.
options.A: To ask Oscar to return a library book.
options.C: To explain why she cannot help with his project.

questions.explanation: The book Oscar wanted is available now.

questions.heading: Swimming Pool Users
questions.text: The small pool is closed today because a children’s lesson has moved there from Friday. Adults may use lanes 1 and 2 in the main pool. Please keep lane 3 free for swimming club training.
questions.question: What does the notice tell swimmers?

options.C: Some adults can swim, but only in certain lanes.
options.A: The children’s swimming lesson has been cancelled.
options.B: The swimming club will use the small pool today.

questions.explanation: Adults can use lanes 1 and 2 only.

questions.heading: From: Jenny / Subject: Photos
questions.text: Thanks for sending the photos from the concert. They’re great, but please don’t put the one of me singing online. I look terrible in it! You can share the group photo if everyone else agrees.
questions.question: What does Jenny want?

options.A: To choose which photo may appear online.
options.B: To ask for more photos from the concert.
options.C: To stop anyone sharing the group photo.

questions.explanation: Jenny says one photo should not go online, but another may be shared.

questions.heading: Used Uniform Sale
questions.text: Clean school jackets, skirts and sports shirts will be sold in the main hall on Tuesday. Prices are lower than in shops. Please bring cash, as we cannot take card payments during the sale.
questions.question: What should people know about the sale?

options.B: They need to pay in a particular way.
options.A: They can sell their own clothes there.
options.C: They must buy all uniform items new.

questions.explanation: The poster says people must bring cash.
